reviews.comment:

(Translated by Google)
Quick and good service. They don't have air for the tires.

reviewReply.comment: Hola. A veces se hace lenta la carga. Mil disculpas

reviews.comment:
Se complica con la atención porque demoran demasiado y siempre hay que hacer fila afuera de la estación...supongo que es la costumbre de la ciudad la parsimonia en el servicio

(Translated by Google)
The service is complicated because they take too long and you always have to queue outside the station... I guess the slow service is just a local custom.

reviewReply.comment: Hola Dani. Lamentablemente hay horas en la que estamos desbordados

reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1037497486456345522/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURfOWZUa0NnEAE

reviews.comment:
Mas de media hora esperando y seguimos aca, los playeros se toman su tiempo para atender. Hay una cola de mas de una cuadra. Pesimo servicio como todas las ypf. Si pueden evitarla, evitenla.

(Translated by Google)
We've been waiting for over half an hour and we're still here. The attendants are taking their sweet time serving us. There's a line that stretches for more than a block. Terrible service, like all YPF stations. If you can avoid it, do.

reviews.comment:
Colaboraron ya que no podía ingresar a WIFI por un error de red

(Translated by Google)
They helped because I couldn't access the Wi-Fi due to a network error.

reviewReply.comment: A veces el wi fi se satura. Es el del pueblo. Nos alegramos de haber podido ayudar

reviewReply.comment: Gracias Martin. Te esperamos cuando quieras
